summary.en: Results-driven Full Stack Software Engineer with 4+ years of experience building scalable backend systems, microservices architectures, and developer tooling across fintech and enterprise domains. Proficient in .NET Core, Golang, and cloud-native platforms (Azure, Oracle Cloud), with a meticulous approach to clean, test-driven code. A collaborative engineer who has led intern teams as Scrum Master and Frontend Technical Mentor, and represented the team at community events including GDG Kaohsiung. Holds a CKAD certification and a Master of Computer Science, consistently accountable for delivering production-quality systems from initial design to deployment.

details.en: Leading Asia-region service integration for a global vehicle care platform, bridging business operations across markets using .NET Core.

achievements.en: Built cross-regional business integration services using .NET Core to support Asia-market operations
Implemented backend APIs bridging Cafler's global platform with Asia-specific business workflows

details.en: Redesigned and optimized backend infrastructure for a loan processing platform, migrating a monolithic system to a microservices architecture.

achievements.en: Reconstructed the credit loan system using microservices architecture, improving scalability and reducing deployment coupling
Redesigned the strategy module to decouple business rules from core loan processing logic
Implemented SSO/OAuth login system, enabling unified authentication across multiple internal services
Set up Azure DevOps CI/CD pipelines, reducing manual deployment effort and improving release consistency
Deployed production services on Oracle Cloud Platform (OCP), establishing a cloud-native infrastructure
Configured integration test environments for Esso, UserInfo, OracleDB, and Redis, enabling reliable pre-production validation

details.en: Developed payment processing systems and third-party API integrations. Led intern teams and championed engineering practices including hexagonal architecture, DevOps, and TDD.

achievements.en: Led intern team as Scrum Master and Frontend Technical Mentor, hosting workshops on hexagonal architecture and refactoring best practices
Built and delivered Docker and Kubernetes DevOps workshops, upskilling team members in container-based deployments
Implemented ELK stack monitoring for Kubernetes projects, improving observability across distributed services
Refactored legacy codebase and resolved 2+ year-old production bugs, increasing system stability
Earned CKAD (Certified Kubernetes Application Developer) certification, validating cloud-native engineering expertise
Spoke at GDG Kaohsiung twice, presenting on Golang Discord bot development and Vim IDE configuration
Acted as external liaison, coordinating communication between the engineering team and outside stakeholders

education.title: Master of Computer Science
education.sub_title: National Yunlin University of Science and Technology, YunTech

details.en: Graduated with honors. Researched Blockchain technology and Network Security. Developed a thesis on a secure payment transmission protocol (GSI Protocol).

education.title: Bachelor of Information and Telecommunication Engineering

details.en: Focused on Blockchain and Network Security research.

title.en: GSI Protocol: Boosting Efficiency and Agility in AI-Driven SDD
